summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mock Testing Suite v3.0 screen fixes. All backend APIs working perfectly (7/7). All UI fixes verified: ACD logo in sidebar and home page, 3 styled buttons with correct colors, headset vertical layout, coaching/fail validation popups, settings tabs reordered correctly. App works well at 1280x800 viewport.
passed_tests: All 7 backend API endpoints working (GET settings, GET defaults, GET history stats, POST session start, POST session call, POST gemini summaries, POST finish session)
Sidebar shows ACD logo image instead of 'MTS' text
Home page shows ACD logo image and 3 styled buttons (Start New Session blue, Supervisor Transfer Only green, Session History gray)
Basics page headset section shows vertical layout (flexDirection: column) with USB, Noise Cancelling, Brand/Model items stacked
Calls page coaching validation popup shows 'You did not select any coaching for this call. Continue anyway?' with Yes/No buttons
Calls page fail reason validation shows 'You must select at least one Fail Reason' when fail selected but no reason chosen
Settings tabs are correctly reordered: General, Gemini AI, Google Sheets, Calendar, Payment, Call Types, Shows, Callers, Sup Reasons, Discord
App works well at 1280x800 viewport with all content fitting properly
All page navigation working correctly via sidebar
